subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-08-14 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: It behooveth souls to become submissive and humble with utmost joy and fragrance. From the loved ones of God must they behold such perfections, such conduct and behavior, that they become compelled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: باید نفوس بروح و ریحان خاضع و خاشع شوند.  از احبای الهی کمالاتی ببینند، روش و سلوکی ببینند که مجبور
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @martyrs and martyrdom
